case_title: DALT HOTEL LP VS. BLAIDD APMARDDA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APMARDDA, BLAIDD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 TURK ST. #638, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
